items.title: 📈 Ranked: Premier League's Top 50 players
items.summary: With just over a month remaining in the 2025-26 season, we rank the best players in England's top division.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Freshman Phenom, Veteran Stars Shine in Ohio State's Spring Game
items.summary: The Ohio State Buckeyes concluded their annual spring game today, with new faces and returning stars showcasing their talent.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Malinga, Reddy sink CSK chase to defend under-par 194 in Hyderabad
items.summary: Abhishek Sharma's blazing 59 off 22 balls set up SRH's win as CSK continued to falter in 190-plus chases
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
